nasb.text: Then the angel who was speaking with me returned and roused me, as a man who is awakened from his sleep.

esv.text: And the angel who talked with me came again and woke me, like a man who is awakened out of his sleep.

cnv.text: 那與我說話的天使回來喚醒我，我好像人在睡眠中被人喚醒一樣。

ccb.text: 那位与我说话的天使又来唤醒我，像唤醒睡觉的人一样。
